candidate_summary: 3-tier spatial-landmark agent memory inspired by Tuvan/Mongolic ovoo cairns: T1 high-altitude summaries, T2 crossroads junctions, T3 spring resource nodes; spatial-hash keys with top-K pointer values and visit counts; writes deposit pointers, reads use clockwise 3-pass tier-traversal; visit-count drives promote/demote.

results.title: Memory for Autonomous LLM Agents Survey
results.rationale: Pattern C tiered memory with MemGPT-style promotion/demotion directly anticipates candidate's 3-tier + visit-count promote/demote mechanism; only the spatial-landmark framing differs.

results.title: MemoryAgentBench
results.rationale: Explicitly evaluates tiered memory architectures; the category the candidate falls into is already a named benchmark target. KW forces hit.

results.title: A-Mem Agentic Memory
results.rationale: Store/retrieve/update/summarize/discard as callable tools is functionally analogous to deposit/retrieve/promote/demote across tiers; KW>=2 forces hit.

results.title: HMT Hierarchical Memory Transformer
results.rationale: Hierarchical/tiered memory imitating human memorization with segment-level recurrence overlaps candidate's tier specialization; KW>=2 forces hit.

results.title: H-MEM Hierarchical Position-Indexed Memory
results.rationale: Position-indexed hierarchical memory searched layer-by-layer with irrelevant-memory removal directly parallels spatial-hash keys, tier-traversal read, and low-visit demotion.

results.title: MemPalace Spatial Metaphor
results.rationale: Method-of-loci memory-palace already uses cultural-spatial-landmark anchoring for LLM long-term memory; ovoo cairns are a near-identical spatial-landmark instantiation. Both KW>=2 and func>=0.7.

results.title: HashEvict LSH KV Eviction
results.rationale: LSH spatial-hash bucketing with dynamic eviction overlaps the candidate's spatial-hash keys and visit-count demotion; KW>=2 forces hit.

results.title: DeepSeek Engram Conditional Memory
results.rationale: Conditional scalable lookup is an orthogonal sparsity axis; no spatial/tier/landmark/visit-count overlap.

decision_rationale: Candidate fails novelty: 7 of 8 prior-art results trigger the hit rule. Core mechanisms are independently anticipated - tiered memory with promote/demote (2603.07670, HMT, H-MEM), spatial-landmark anchoring (MemPalace 2604.21284 with func=0.82 and sem=0.74), spatial-hash bucketing with eviction (HashEvict), and tier-traversal layer-by-layer search (H-MEM). The Tuvan ovoo framing is a cultural relabeling of an already-dense design space; the 3-tier + spatial-hash + visit-count + multi-pass-traversal combination offers no mechanism not already covered.
